name: jdy_query_cc_list
description_zh: 查询流程抄送（知会）列表
description: Query the workflow CC (carbon copy/知会) list. Requires username. Returns cc records with data_id, app_id, entry_id, flow_node info, and sender info. Use skip/limit for pagination. Rate limit: 30/s.

username.description: 要查询抄送的成员username（必填）
